interface.coordinates: X from -240 to 240, Y from -180 to 180
interface.variable_blocks: Found in the orange 'Variables' category. You must create a variable first using the 'Make a Variable' button to see the specific blocks like 'set', 'change', 'show', and 'hide'.

technical_constraints.cloud_variables: Can only store numeric values. For text/names, use a numeric encoding system.
technical_constraints.custom_blocks: The 'Run without screen refresh' option is essential for complex physics and instant calculations.

tips: Use 'collision detection' logic for games like 'Eliminar Marcianitos'.
Geometry spirals are best done with the 'Pen' extension blocks.
10 short activities are the best way to introduce logic before big projects.
